documentation.description:
=== Variables Plugins ===
The `Wiki.Plugins.Variables` package defines a the variables plugin that allows
to set or update a variable that will be replaced by the `Wiki.Filters.Variables` filter.

tagged_types.name: List_Variable_Plugin
tagged_types.code: type List_Variable_Plugin is new Wiki_Plugin with null record;

tagged_types.name: Variable_Plugin
tagged_types.code: type Variable_Plugin is new Wiki_Plugin with null record;

subprograms.name: Expand
